ops.body: Fix-queue update: t05's fix commit 59d7e3fd closed the first trio (shared text-level predicate via rendering.gate_text_is_substantive; sampled_session bookkeeping; transactional prune report). Its own review surfaced a FINAL trio, queued behind t2c1's in-flight batch: (1) live_gate_row must validate the parquet-bound render with the shared predicate (RENDER_BLOCK only parses user|assistant blocks — a <system>-shaped live payload passes export, fails freeze); (2) prune classify moves OUTSIDE the write transaction with delete-by-keys + restored planned-vs-deleted RuntimeError tripwire (bounded lock hold vs the pipeline's 2s busy timeout); (3) zero-turn parsed sessions get marked sampled (small-budget starvation edge). Also confirmed by that review: sampled_session auto-creates on existing DBs via CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS in GATE_DDL — no manual migration. Nightly re-pollution measured: gate_sample regrew to 18153 rows / 2595 empty (0 role-marker-shaped) — re-prune AFTER the release ships the guards, then re-export, then T3.
